title: Imperial shuttle (disambiguation)
content:
'''Imperial shuttle''' can refer to several different types of shuttles:
*[[Delta-class JV-7 escort shuttle|''Delta''-class JV-7 escort shuttle]]
*[[Delta-class T-3c shuttle]]
*[[Kappa-class shuttle|''Kappa''-class shuttle]]
*[[Lambda-class T-4a shuttle/Legends|''Lambda''-class T-4a shuttle]]
*[[Theta-class T-2c shuttle/Legends|''Theta''-class T-2c shuttle]]
*[[Nune-class Imperial shuttle|''Nune''-class Imperial shuttle]]
*[[Zeta-class long-range shuttle|''Zeta''-class long range shuttle]]
*[[ISP-6 Imperial Shuttle Pod]]
{{Disambig}}
